function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0010
alias: helios_checklist_pack_invoice
issued_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 780
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780
    line_eur: 780
---
# Helios checklist rewrite invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0010                       |
| alias          | helios_checklist_pack_invoice  |
| issued_on      | 2026-04-14                     |
| total_eur      | 780                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 780      | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Recent client-visible invoice tied to the sprint deliverable rather than open-ended product thinking.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-structuring the target invoice note with YAML frontmatter per the finance schema, preserving the original body verbatim beneath the frontmatter, and then deleting the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved exact original note body below frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR-style frontmatter extraction on the specified invoice. The target invoice note contained all required schema fields and line data, allowing exact extraction without guessing per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md and migration workflow rules. After successful file update, inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
